sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The torch.compile issue described in #4959 arises from overriding the forward method of CustomOp.
When torch.compile is applied, the _forward_method of CustomOp is replaced with forward_native (see here). The forward method uses _forward_method for dispatching. However, if the forward met

sglang.title: [Fix] Turn off DeepGEMM by default
sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Currently DeepGEMM is turned on by default for deepseek models, which caused confusions (#5223) on its performance due to warmup time. This PR makes DeepGEMM turned off by default.
SGL_ENABLE_JIT_DEEPGEMM=1 variable can be passed to enable DeepGEMM.

Notable changes:

Updates ParallelConfig.distributed_executor_backend to use Literal[...] instead of str
Rename nullable_str to optional_str (which sounds more Pythonic) and add other optional type methods
Make the conversion of config docstring to argparse arguments much m

vllm.title: [Misc] remove warning if triton>=3.2.0
vllm.author: DefTruth
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Remove warning if triton>=3.2.0, since now triton are already >= 3.2.0

vllm.title: [Misc] refactor examples
vllm.author: reidliu41
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Continue to refactor Cohere Rerank Client , Disaggregated Prefill LMCache, Disaggregated Prefill
OpenAI Chat Completion Client, Jinaai Rerank Client

vllm.title: [Misc] Update usage with mooncake lib for kv transfer
vllm.author: ShangmingCai
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
We have refactored the mooncake lib and updated the interface to make it formatted in the Python style.
Also, Mooncake supports pip install now.
pip3 install mooncake-transfer-engine
So this PR updates the interfaces related to the usage of the mooncake lib.

building and installing hf-xet from source

Also, fix __getitem__ not updating cache stats
FIX #16273 (comment)

vllm.title: Fix triton install condition on CPU
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Issues were also seen when trying to install on Mac.
This PR inverts the condition to make it so that triton is only installed for x86 CPUs.

vllm.title: Fix vLLM x torch.compile config caching
vllm.author: zou3519
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #16150
